features: CORDED – Achieve your beard styling needs with this corded stubble and beard trimmer can be used continuously as you will never run out of power, particularly useful if you need to use it for an extended period of time

BUMP-FREE TRIMMING - Trim, shave, detail and outline with the T-Pro Corded T-Blade Trimmer. The wide T-Blade is precision ground, ensuring close bump-free trimming. We only use high precision blade grinding technology, ensuring the best cutting performance for you
MULTIFUNCTIONAL – For Male Body Grooming this trimmer is ideal for trimming, outlining, body grooming, detailing and shaving

SUPERIOR CUTTING PERFORMANCE – The precision ground T-blades ensure the best cutting performance, so you can achieve the look you want with ease. Achieve an ultra-close cut of 0.5mm and add one of three attachment comes offering lengths up to 10mm

ERGONOMIC DESIGN - The sleek black and chrome design features a durable, non-slip rubber grip to provide maximum comfort. The smaller design offers all the power of a full-size clipper and cuts with speed
description: Product Description The T-Pro Rechargeable Trimmer kit offers barbershop results within the comfort of your own home. This trimmer features a T-blade that is ideal for all your needs such as trimming, outlining, body grooming, detailing and shaving. The blades are precision-ground, detachable and rinseable, for a superior cutting performance, close bump-free trimming and easy cleaning and maintenance. Achieve an ultra-close cut of 0.5mm and add one of three attachment comes offering lengths up to 10mm. Achieve your beard styling needs with this corded stubble and beard trimmer can be used continuously as you will never run out of power, particularly useful if you need to use it for an extended period of time. Comfort, quality and ease of use were highly thought of while designing this trimmer, resulting in high-quality performance. The sleek black and chrome design features a durable, non-slip rubber grip to provide maximum comfort. The smaller design offers all the power of a full size clipper and cuts with speed. The kit includes your beard trimming necessities T-Pro Corded T-Blade Trimmer, T-Blade attachment combs (#1-3), Pre shave brush, Moustache comb, Cleaning brush, Blade oil and Instruction booklet. Directions 1. Plug in the trimmer. 2. Choose the appropriate attachment for your desired beard length. 3. Select a trimming length on the trimmer. 4. Apply shaving cream or gel if desired. 5. Trim your beard following the direction of hair growth. 6. Rinse the trimmer with water and let it dry after use. Safety Warning Before using this hair clipper kit, please read the instructions carefully. Avoid using the trimmer near the face or eyes. Do not swallow or inhale small parts. Clean the device thoroughly after each use. This product is intended for adult use. Box Contains 1 x Corded trimmer; 3 x T-blade attachment combs; 1 x Blade guard; 1 x Pre shave brush; 1 x Cleaning brush & blade oil See more
